raw_sql:
WITH movie_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS num_countries,
    array_agg(DISTINCT cn.country_code ORDER BY cn.country_code) FILTER (WHERE cn.country_code IS NOT NULL) AS countries
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  num_countries,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS pct
FROM movie_countries
GROUP BY num_countries
ORDER BY num_countries;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS num_countries
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
movie_ratings AS (
  SELECT 
    movie_id,
    info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN mcc.num_countries = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(mr.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mr.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
  ROUND(STDDEV(mr.rating)::numeric, 3) AS std_rating,
  ROUND(MIN(mr.rating)::numeric, 1) AS min_rating,
  ROUND(MAX(mr.rating)::numeric, 1) AS max_rating
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN movie_ratings mr ON mcc.movie_id = mr.movie_id
GROUP BY production_type
ORDER BY production_type;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
genre_info AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info AS genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT
  mcc.production_type,
  gi.genre,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY mcc.production_type), 2) AS pct_of_type
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN genre_info gi ON mcc.movie_id = gi.movie_id
GROUP BY mcc.production_type, gi.genre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 100
ORDER BY mcc.production_type, n_movies DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
-- Exclude shorts
non_shorts AS (
  SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
  HAVING NOT bool_or(info = 'Short')
),
runtime_info AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MIN(info::numeric) AS runtime_min
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+$'
    AND info::numeric BETWEEN 40 AND 300
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
movie_ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
)
SELECT
  mcc.production_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mcc.movie_id) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(rt.runtime_min)::numeric, 1) AS avg_runtime,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rt.runtime_min)::numeric, 0) AS median_runtime,
  ROUND(AVG(mr.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mr.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN non_shorts ns ON mcc.movie_id = ns.movie_id
JOIN runtime_info rt ON mcc.movie_id = rt.movie_id
JOIN movie_ratings mr ON mcc.movie_id = mr.movie_id
GROUP BY mcc.production_type
ORDER BY mcc.production_type;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
-- Cast members (actors/actresses only) per movie
cast_per_movie AS (
  SELECT ci.movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS n_cast_members
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
  GROUP BY ci.movie_id
),
-- Count how many cast members have ANY aka_name entry (proxy for international identity)
aka_cast AS (
  SELECT ci.movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS n_cast_with_aka
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
  GROUP BY ci.movie_id
),
non_shorts AS (
  SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
  HAVING NOT bool_or(info = 'Short')
)
SELECT
  mcc.production_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mcc.movie_id) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(cpm.n_cast_members)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cast_size,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(ac.n_cast_with_aka, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_cast_with_aka,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN cpm.n_cast_members > 0 
    THEN 100.0 * COALESCE(ac.n_cast_with_aka, 0) / cpm.n_cast_members 
    ELSE NULL END)::numeric, 1) AS avg_pct_cast_with_aka
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN non_shorts ns ON mcc.movie_id = ns.movie_id
JOIN cast_per_movie cpm ON mcc.movie_id = cpm.movie_id
LEFT JOIN aka_cast ac ON mcc.movie_id = ac.movie_id
GROUP BY mcc.production_type
ORDER BY mcc.production_type;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
non_shorts AS (
  SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
  HAVING NOT bool_or(info = 'Short')
),
movie_ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
),
primary_genre AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (movie_id) movie_id, info AS genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    AND info IN ('Drama','Comedy','Thriller','Action','Horror','Romance','Documentary','Animation','Crime','Adventure','Family','Sci-Fi')
  ORDER BY movie_id, info
)
SELECT
  pg.genre,
  mcc.production_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(mr.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mr.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN non_shorts ns ON mcc.movie_id = ns.movie_id
JOIN movie_ratings mr ON mcc.movie_id = mr.movie_id
JOIN primary_genre pg ON mcc.movie_id = pg.movie_id
GROUP BY pg.genre, mcc.production_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100
ORDER BY pg.genre, mcc.production_type;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
non_shorts AS (
  SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
  HAVING NOT bool_or(info = 'Short')
),
movie_ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$'
),
movie_votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::bigint AS votes
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+$'
)
SELECT
  mcc.production_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN mv.votes < 100 THEN '<100 votes'
    WHEN mv.votes < 1000 THEN '100-999'
    WHEN mv.votes < 10000 THEN '1K-9.9K'
    WHEN mv.votes < 100000 THEN '10K-99K'
    ELSE '100K+'
  END AS vote_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(mr.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(mv.votes)::numeric, 0) AS avg_votes
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN non_shorts ns ON mcc.movie_id = ns.movie_id
JOIN movie_ratings mr ON mcc.movie_id = mr.movie_id
JOIN movie_votes mv ON mcc.movie_id = mv.movie_id
GROUP BY mcc.production_type, vote_bucket
ORDER BY mcc.production_type, MIN(mv.votes);

raw_sql:
WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country' ELSE 'multi-country' END AS production_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
non_shorts AS (
  SELECT movie_id FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
  HAVING NOT bool_or(info = 'Short')
),
movie_votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::bigint AS votes
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info ~ '^[0-9]+$'
    AND info::bigint >= 1000  -- only reasonably-voted films
)
SELECT
  t.production_year,
  mcc.production_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN mcc.production_type = 'multi-country' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year) / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year), 1) AS pct_multi
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN title t ON mcc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN non_shorts ns ON mcc.movie_id = ns.movie_id
JOIN movie_votes mv ON mcc.movie_id = mv.movie_id
GROUP BY t.production_year, mcc.production_type
ORDER BY t.production_year, mcc.production_type;
